rawAssistant: Can't be easy work when the ground decides to get a mite restless, eh? We've had our share of tremors lately, and it's got everyone on edge. Some say it's just the rain settling in, but I've been doin' this job long enough to know that there's more to it than that. Still, we can't let it stop us from gettin' the job done. We need to take a closer look at what's goin' on with them fresh signs you spotted. You best get to work and see if you can dig up some answers for me.
